name: I'm scared to report my injury because I need the job—help?

mainEntity.name: I'm scared to report my injury because I need the job—help?

acceptedAnswer.description: Report—law protects you, retaliation illegal; benefits secure income.[1][3] Key factors: Anonymous tips possible initially. Practical guidance: Written report to HR, copy yourself; union if applicable. Commission confidential help.[2] Job security stronger long-term.
